findings.description: is_minimal_pair_scorer shared-suffix check is structurally incompatible with refusal and impossibility prompt designs. The scorer checks whether the LAST N words match, but refusal/impossibility pairs share a PREFIX (verb/action), not a suffix. The scorer would reject ALL refusal and impossibility pairs as non-minimal.
findings.impact: Any downstream code using this scorer would incorrectly reject 2/3 of comparison types. Not called in pipeline currently, so no impact on computed results.
findings.recommendation: Add shared-prefix check alongside shared-suffix check. Accept pairs where EITHER matches.

findings.description: Within-fold FWL in groupkfold_auroc reimplements residualization manually instead of using fwl_residualize(within_fold=True, train_idx, test_idx). Fits LinearRegression twice on identical data: once via fwl_residualize(within_fold=False) for training data, once directly for test data. Produces correct results by coincidence (same OLS on same inputs), but creates divergence risk.
findings.impact: No current correctness impact. If either regression path is modified independently, train/test residualization would silently diverge.
findings.recommendation: Replace with single call to fwl_residualize(X, Z, within_fold=True, train_idx=train_idx, test_idx=test_idx).

findings.description: Group label computation int(np.median(y[groups==g] > 0.5)) truncates 0.5 to 0 for balanced groups. Python int() floors, so mixed groups always get label 0.
findings.impact: Never triggered in current code (unique groups). Would cause degenerate permutation test with paired groups.
findings.recommendation: Use int(np.round(np.median(...))) or explicit majority vote.

findings.description: Hardcoded power=0.80 placeholder in _do_verdicts. power_analysis() exists in stats.py but is never called. The 'underpowered' verdict can never fire.
findings.impact: Pipeline cannot detect underpowered experiments. Scientific validity of verdict system is incomplete.
findings.recommendation: Compute actual power or document that power checking is deferred.

findings.description: Two disjoint verdict string sets: verdict_scorer returns raw strings (input_confounded, collapsed, genuine_signal, etc.), types.py defines Verdict enum with different values (CONFIRMED, FALSIFIED, etc.). The enum is dead code.
findings.impact: No type safety on verdicts. Enum is unused dead code.
findings.recommendation: Align enum with scorer values or remove the enum.

findings.description: UnboundLocalError when max_iterations=0 and existing pairs are provided. Variable 'iteration' from for-loop is undefined if loop never executes.
findings.impact: Crash on edge-case configuration. Not a silent bug.

findings.description: sys.path.insert(0, ...) in _load_refusal_items and _load_impossibility_items accumulates duplicates with no guard.
findings.recommendation: Use importlib for isolated dynamic imports or convert data files to JSON.

findings.description: 186-line inline question list in pipeline orchestrator. Inconsistent with refusal/impossibility data which use separate files.
findings.impact: Code organization only. No correctness impact.

findings.description: Redundant tokenization: analyze_length_distribution and analyze_pair_balance each tokenize all prompts independently. 2x work when called together from analyze_pair_set.
TF-IDF + KMeans computed twice in single analyze_gaps() call: once for entropy (line 318-326), once in _compute_gaps (line 249-254).
findings.impact: 2x clustering cost. No correctness impact (same random_state=42).
findings.recommendation: Compute once, pass results to both consumers.

findings.description: Inconsistency: _token_length_density uses both positive and negative prompts, _token_entropy uses only positive. Both called from analyze_gaps.
findings.impact: Inconsistent density vs entropy views. No correctness impact on gap ranking.
findings.recommendation: Document or standardize which sides are used.

findings.description: 8 optional FeatureVector fields (norm_variance, gen_delta, layer_uniformity, head_variance, max_layer_rank, top_sv_ratio, rank_10, layer_variance) are declared but never populated by extract_from_cache.
findings.recommendation: Remove unused fields or implement features.

findings.description: Unused 'label' parameter in _side_stats inner function. Called with 'positive'/'negative' but the value is never used.
feature_extractor.py imports MODEL_CACHE_DIR from models.py only to re-export as DEFAULT_MODEL_CACHE_DIR. Never used internally.
findings.impact: Unnecessary coupling between feature extractor and model management.
findings.recommendation: Remove if backward compatibility no longer needed.

findings.description: Red team: The hardcoded power=0.80 + within-fold FWL divergence represent the highest-risk path. Power placeholder means underpowered experiments are never flagged. FWL divergence is correct today but any modification to one regression path without the other would silently produce mismatched train/test residualization. Additionally, BCa bootstrap implementation could not be verified against a reference at runtime.
findings.impact: No current impact. Highest future risk for silent incorrect results.
findings.recommendation: Call power_analysis() in pipeline. Use fwl_residualize(within_fold=True) instead of manual reimplementation. Add BCa test cases with known-correct reference intervals.

referrals.description: Verify hardcoded power=0.80 in _do_verdicts is intentional or forgotten TODO. If unintentional, 'underpowered' verdict can never fire.
Verify _do_falsification uses fwl_residualize(within_fold=False) intentionally as comparison baseline, or whether it should be within_fold=True per C4 fix.
Verify pipeline stage cache correctly prevents stale data from previous runs with different configuration.
